name: Mackerel
description: Observability platform by Hatena Co. — Japanese APM with OpenTelemetry tracing, metrics, alerting for cloud systems.

seo.title: Mackerel — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Mackerel: Observability platform by Hatena Co. — Japanese APM with OpenTelemetry tracing, metrics, alerting for cloud systems.

when_to_use: OpenTelemetry-native tracing and metrics for cloud systems
Alerts and dashboards for Japanese cloud infrastructure
Service-based cost and performance tracking with roles
Integration with AWS CloudWatch and GCP for unified view

pros: Modern APM with OTel tracing from Hatena
Clean UI and strong Japanese market presence
Fair pricing vs Datadog and New Relic
Reliable with strong uptime track record
review.verdict: Dependable regional APM for Japan, but language and ecosystem limit appeal globally.
review.best_for: Japanese teams wanting native-language APM with OTel support.
review.not_for: Global teams preferring English-first tooling and large integration catalogs.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier, no explicit peak-lock evidence
